verses.text: The \+w LORD\+w* reigneth, he is clothed with majesty; the \+w LORD\+w* is clothed with strength, wherewith he hath girded himself: the world also is stablished, that it cannot be moved.
Thy throne is established of old: thou art from everlasting.
The floods have lifted up, O \+w LORD\+w*, the floods have lifted up their voice; the floods lift up their waves.
The \+w LORD\+w* on high is mightier than the noise of many waters, yea, than the mighty waves of the sea.
Thy testimonies are very sure: holiness becometh thine house, O \+w LORD\+w*, for ever.
